action.reasoning: Observation: test_preprocess.py diagnostic succeeded (FULL SEQUENTIAL PREPROCESS with language merge after LanguageProcessorStep, observation preserved, PIL 224x224 images under exact PI0 view keys, padded 32D state+action, complementary_data+task). But predict.py truncated at _prepare_observation ('if isinstan') causing test_obs.py to hit 'All image features are missing from the batch' -> fallback zero-action (mock success=1 but real evals all 0.0 across 19+ iters). RecordingEvaluator and PI0 load are solid. Analysis: The working batch+sequential+merge pattern from diagnostic resolves the training-oriented pipeline mutation (LanguageStep returns partial dict; merge tokens/attention_mask/language while preserving observation/images/state). Full non-truncated predict.py copying this exact pattern into _safe_preprocess + _prepare_observation (map 4-cam rgb to 3 PI0 views as PIL, state pad, dummy_action=32, chunking+pending queue, tuned delta ee bridge pos*0.05/euler*0.25/grip>0.5->1.0), complete main() parsing eval_config.json+track_path, and full RecordingEvaluator (super init + evaluate_single_episode per contract) will produce real policy actions without error. Matches intended Pi0 track (LIBERO-pretrained pick/place should give >0 success on add_condiment/select once end-to-end). Mock already validates movement. Decision: Overwrite predict.py with COMPLETE clean implementation (exact diagnostic pattern, no truncation, improved error handling, action chunking for efficiency), run python test_preprocess.py && python test_obs.py for validation (expect FULL PREPROCESS SUCCEEDED + real policy actions in mock without fallback), then submit_eval on base ckpt for first non-zero success_rate before LoRA/training.
